creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 172377
Patch against git repository to build with gtk-sharp30 installed.

Hi!

FWI, I could build a fresh MonoDevelop (from git's master at 1dc0ed993f9a6476544bfebe6be4162c8f6fad7c) with only this tiny patch so that F# does not use gtk-sharp30 but the older gtk-sharp20.
